task_completion.description: Create a new ground station named 'Manhattan_Urban' with the correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New ground station' or 'Edit ground station' dialog in GPredict showing the Name as 'Manhattan_Urban', Latitude as 40.7580 (or 40.758), Longitude as 73.9855 W (or -73.9855), and Altitude as 50m.

task_completion.description: Set 'Manhattan_Urban' as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window under 'Ground Stations' or the ground station list where 'Manhattan_Urban' is selected or marked as the default (e.g., a checkmark or default indicator).

task_completion.description: Delete the 'Pittsburgh' ground station and the 'Amateur' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict window tabs to ensure 'Amateur' is no longer present. Look at the Ground Stations list/manager to verify 'Pittsburgh' is no longer listed.

task_completion.description: Create a new tracking module named 'High_Passes' using the 'Manhattan_Urban' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'New module' dialog or a new tab in the main window named 'High_Passes'. The module properties should show 'Manhattan_Urban' selected as its ground station.

task_completion.description: Add the four required satellites to the 'High_Passes' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'High_Passes' module configuration or the main tracking view for this tab. It must display exactly these satellites: SAUDISAT 1C (SO-50), FUNCUBE-1 (AO-73), FOX-1A (AO-85), and ISS (ZARYA).

task_completion.description: Update the global pass prediction preferences to a minimum elevation of 45 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (Edit -> Preferences), specifically under the 'Predict' or 'Passes' section, showing the 'Minimum elevation' field set to 45 degrees.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application rather than directly editing configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with GPredict's graphical dialog boxes (Preferences, New Module, Edit Ground Station) rather than a terminal window running a text editor like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict interface should be visible with standard window manager borders, menus, and satellite tracking maps/lists, not a mock-up or a text file.

integrity.description: The agent manually searched for or selected the correct satellites rather than just pasting IDs into a config file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the satellite selection dialog in GPredict where the agent searches for satellites by name or NORAD ID and moves them to the selected list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Manhattan_Urban ground station coordinates: Latitude 40.7580 N, Longitude 73.9855 W (or -73.9855), Altitude 50m. Required satellites in the High_Passes module: SAUDISAT 1C (SO-50) [27607], FUNCUBE-1 (AO-73) [39444], FOX-1A (AO-85) [40967], and ISS (ZARYA) [25544]. Global minimum elevation must be exactly 45 degrees.
